market_context.insider_activity_summary: Snížená aktivita během holiday období, žádné významné clustery za poslední 48h

brief.macro_summary: Trump prohlásil ceasefire s Íránem za 'over', ropa skočila +5%, futures propadly. FOMC minutes dnes 2PM ET rozhodnou o září hike pravděpodobnosti (50%). Slabý NFP z pátku snížil rate hike expectations.
brief.afterhours_summary: Energy stocks (OXY +3.8%, XOM +3.25%) rallying v pre-market. Tech slabý (NVDA -2.45%). Alibaba +10.4% na earnings optimismus.
brief.geopolitical_summary: Obnovené strikes v Hormuz Strait, Trump rušící Iran deal. Oil shock vrací inflační obavy. Fed v dilema mezi slabým labor market a vyšší inflací.

sectors.name: Technology
sectors.reason: Rate hike fears, rotation z AI stocks, Nasdaq -1.3%

sectors.name: Financials
sectors.reason: Higher yields positive ale recession fears offsetují

sectors.name: Industrials
sectors.reason: Oil costs negativní, ale infra spending pozitivní

picks.thesis_macro: Iran conflict + oil $74+ = direct upstream producer beneficiary
picks.thesis_technical: Break above $49, testing 200MA, volume 2x avg, RSI 58
picks.thesis_catalyst: Hormuz attacks continuation + FOMC dovish = prolonged oil premium
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest 4.2%, low squeeze risk ale momentum positive
picks.thesis_insider: CEO bought $2M shares v June, bullish signal
picks.thesis_volume: Pre-market volume 3.8M vs 10M avg, institutional accumulation
picks.thesis_correlation: Pure upstream play, nekoreláno s tech rotation today
picks.thesis_risk: Oil reversal pokud Trump oznámí nový Iran deal
picks.exit_logic: $50.50 = prior resistance + 2.6% realistic intraday v volatility
picks.probability_reasoning: Strong geopolitical catalyst + technical setup + sector momentum alignment

picks.thesis_macro: Integrated major benefits z oil rally + downstream margins stable
picks.thesis_technical: Holding $137 support, MACD cross, volume strong at $138

picks.thesis_options: Mixed sentiment ale institutions accumulating long dated calls
picks.thesis_correlation: Diversified od pure upstream, better risk/reward v OXY
picks.thesis_risk: Dividend cut fears pokud oil reverses quickly
picks.probability_reasoning: Strong fundamentals + oil tailwind + low volatility relative setup

picks.thesis_options: Mixed sentiment, slight put bias emerging today
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest minimal ale momentum fading
picks.thesis_insider: No significant activity, CEO raised prices = margin pressure signal
picks.thesis_correlation: Tech leader = proxy pro sector rotation away
picks.entry_logic: Short below $311 = break of intraday support
picks.probability_reasoning: Technical setup strong ale macro headwinds vs buyback support uncertainty

picks.thesis_options: Heavy put volume today, sentiment shifting bearish
picks.thesis_short_interest: Short interest $16.7B highest among chips = potential flush lower

picks.thesis_volume: Pre-market volume light = low conviction bounce

picks.thesis_macro: Sector ETF = diversified energy exposure bez single stock risk
picks.thesis_catalyst: Oil $74+ = all holdings benefit, XLE pre-market +2%
picks.thesis_options: Sector rotation clearly visible v options flow
picks.thesis_short_interest: ETF short interest minimal, pure directional play
picks.thesis_insider: N/A pro ETF, underlying holdings showing insider buying

picks.thesis_correlation: Perfectly captures energy theme bez correlation to tech
picks.thesis_risk: Oil reversal pokud geopolitical news improves suddenly
picks.exit_logic: $55.30 = prior June high, 2.41% realistic ETF move

brief.portfolio_note: Alokace 3 energy longs (63k), 2 tech shorts (40k). Hedged proti FOMC surprise. Energy dominance = clear theme. Max allocation $103,249.74 dodržena.
risks: Oil flash crash na supply news
brief.data_freshness: Ceny ověřeny 7/8/2026 8:00-10:37 AM EDT z Yahoo Finance, Robinhood, Investing.com. Futures z 8:58 AM EDT. FOMC minutes release 2PM ET dnes.

review.index_recap: S&P 500 uzavřel na 7,482.71 (-0.28%), Nasdaq na 25,870.65 (+0.20%), Dow klesl o 1.09% na 52,348.39 v důsledku eskalace napětí USA-Írán
review.narrative: Energetické picky perfektně zachytily geopolitickou prémii s výbornými zisky, ale tech shorty selhaly kvůli nečekanému rally Nasdaqu uprostřed širokého výprodeje. Exekuce byla polovičatá - skvělý den pro energetický sektor maskuje špatné načasování na short pozicích.

picks_review.commentary: Otevřel výrazně výše (+10.1%) kvůli overnight eskalaci napětí v Hormuz, ale během dne ztratil veškeré zisky. Výsledkem minimální profit.
picks_review.what_worked: Makro teze perfektní - Írán konflikt eskaloval, ropa vzrostla 7%, energetické akcie měly rally
picks_review.what_failed: Obrovský gap open (+10%) znehodnotil entry plán a target byl nedosažitelný intraday, momentum se otočilo
picks_review.probability_comment: 68% bylo příliš konzervativní na tak silný geopolitický katalyzátor

picks_review.commentary: Otevřel pod entry, dosáhl intraday high $139.14, ale pak kolaboval zpět na téměř otevírací cenu. Diversifikovaný model neudržel momentum jako pure play.
picks_review.thesis_macro_verdict: Partially correct but underperformed pure upstream
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: Support broken, consolidation failed to hold
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Redomiciliation drowned out by broader selloff
picks_review.thesis_options_verdict: Mixed sentiment proved prescient - lacked conviction
picks_review.what_worked: Initial pop z ropného rally, dosáhl +1.45% intraday
picks_review.what_failed: Integrovaný model nemá exponenciální expozici jako OXY, broader market drag stáhl cenu dolů
picks_review.probability_comment: Podcenili jsme slabší beta vs pure upstream v explosive oil moves

picks_review.commentary: Gap up open okamžitě triggered stop loss. Tech nakonec klesl jak predikováno, ale short byl stopped out v prvních minutách.
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: Wrong near term - gap up invalidated setup
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Broadcom deal trumped rotation fears short term
picks_review.thesis_options_verdict: Put bias failed to predict gap up
picks_review.thesis_volume_verdict: Low volume continued, no distribution materialized
picks_review.what_worked: Direktivní teze byla správná - AAPL zavřel -0.37% na $309.52, pod naším targetem $305.50
picks_review.what_failed: Gap open +1.3% okamžitě triggered stop, nebyl prostor pro intraday mean reversion kterou jsme očekávali
picks_review.probability_comment: Stop příliš těsný v volatile geopolitickém prostředí

picks_review.commentary: Perplexity deal announcement způsobil 3%+ spike intraday, triggered stop loss. Náš bearish setup byl zničen pozitivním AI katalyzátorem.
picks_review.thesis_technical_verdict: Descending channel broken with authority upward
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: DeepSeek narrative overpowered by Perplexity win
picks_review.thesis_options_verdict: Heavy put volume was head fake
picks_review.what_worked: Nic - naprosto špatné načasování a směr
picks_review.what_failed: Neočekávaný pozitivní katalyzátor (Perplexity deal), podcenili jsme AI infrastructure demand, short interest squeeze
picks_review.probability_comment: 55% bylo příliš vysoké proti dominantnímu tech trendu

picks_review.commentary: Gap open přímo na close price, dosáhl intraday high $55.68 blízko targetu ale uzavřel flat. ETF diverzifikace poskytla stabilitu.
picks_review.thesis_catalyst_verdict: Oil $74+ nailed, XLE surged in premarket
picks_review.what_worked: Perfektní makro setup, sektor ETF zachytil celou energii rally, vysoký volume, minimální drawdown
picks_review.what_failed: Profit-taking na konci dne zamezil dosažení targetu, gap open neumožnil entry na plánované ceně
picks_review.probability_comment: 70% bylo adekvátní - nejvyšší confidence pick s nejlepší risk/reward

lessons: Gap opens v geopolitických událostech zničí tech short setup - stop loss musí být širší nebo vyhnout se shortům v extreme volatility
Pure upstream energy plays (OXY) vs integrované (XOM) - v explosive oil moves hrát čistou expozici
ETF pozice (XLE) poskytují nejlepší risk/reward v sector rotation s menší stock-specific noise
Shorting dominantní sektor (tech/AI) proti krátkodobému geopolitickému headwindu = nízká win rate, pozitivní katalyzátory (Perplexity) vždy překonají macro fears
tomorrow_watch: FOMC minutes 2:00 PM - hawkish vs dovish tón pro energy vs tech
Írán ceasefire status - další eskalace = další oil spike nebo peace deal = oil dump
Tech follow-through po dnes Nasdaq +0.20% close navzdory broad selloff
Energy profit-taking risk po dnešním +2.4% XLE rally - momentum udržitelné?
